message:
test(frankenterm-core): add fuzz targets for VT parser and grid mutations

Add two cargo-fuzz targets for frankenterm-core:
- fuzz_vt_parser: feeds arbitrary bytes to Parser via both bulk and
  byte-at-a-time paths, testing UTF-8 split-feed and state machine edges
- fuzz_grid_mutations: parses bytes into actions, applies them to a
  Grid+Cursor+Scrollback, then asserts invariants (bounds, dimensions,
  cell accessibility, scroll region validity)

Both targets verified with 5-second smoke runs (~333K and ~215K
iterations respectively) with zero crashes.

Closes bd-lff4p.1.11

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,9 @@ arbitrary = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
 [dependencies.ftui-core]
 path = "../crates/ftui-core"
 
+[dependencies.frankenterm-core]
+path = "../crates/frankenterm-core"
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_input_parser"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_input_parser.rs"
@@ -36,6 +39,20 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_vt_parser"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_vt_parser.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_grid_mutations"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_grid_mutations.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = 3
 debug = true
